seo.title: Imprint | Pavel Levdin
seo.description: Contact and legal information according to German law.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.liabilityText: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content. Our pages' content was created with great care. However, we cannot guarantee accuracy, completeness, and timeliness of content.
imprint.copyrightText: Content and materials on these pages are protected by German copyright law. Reproduction, processing, distribution, and any use outside copyright limits require written consent of the author.
imprint.disputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (OS): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. We are not obligated or willing to participate in dispute resolution procedures through consumer arbitration bodies.

seo.title: Privacy Policy | Pavel Levdin
seo.description: Information about data protection and processing of personal data.

section1.title: Data Controller
section1.text: The data controller is Pavel Levdin, Am Dobben 102A, 28211 Bremen, Germany. If you have any questions about data protection, please contact us at any time.

section2.title: Data Collection
section2.text: We only collect data necessary to provide our services. This includes technical data (IP address, browser type) and voluntary contact inquiries through our contact form.

section3.title: Data Usage
section3.text: Collected data is used exclusively to contact you regarding your inquiry and to improve website functionality. We do not share data with third parties without your consent.

section4.title: Data Security
section4.text: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data from loss, manipulation, and unauthorized access. All data transfers are encrypted (HTTPS).

section5.title: Cookies & Tracking
section5.text: Our website only uses essential cookies for forms and navigation. Third-party tracking services (Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, etc.) are not used. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

section6.title: Your Rights
section6.text: You have the right to request information about your data, demand correction or deletion. Contact us via email for this.

section7.title: Changes to Privacy Policy
section7.text: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. The current version is always available on this page.

cookie.title: Cookies & Privacy
cookie.description: We only use technically necessary cookies for website functionality. No tracking or marketing cookies.
